plot outline: Based on the true story of Richard Jewell, a security guard who discovered a bomb and saved many lives at a concert at Centennial Olympic Park during the 1996 Summer Olympics in Atlanta, Georgia. He was seen as a hero by many and a suspect by the FBI and press.
title: Richard Jewell
akas: 理查德·朱维尔的哀歌 (China, Mandarin title)

production companies.name: Canadian Film or Video Production Tax Credit (CPTC)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
Quebec Film and Television Tax Credit
